tasks.label: Deploy to hi.itsalex.me
args: import paramiko, sys; p=r'${file}'; rp='/srv/hi-glyph/'+p.replace('\\','/').split('relay-server/')[1]; c=paramiko.SSHClient(); c.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy()); c.connect('161.35.95.43',username='root',password='iSstillnothing4_a'); sftp=c.open_sftp(); sftp.put(p,rp); sftp.close(); _,out,err=c.exec_command('pm2 restart hi-glyph'); out.channel.recv_exit_status(); c.close(); print('Deployed: '+rp)
